end end return(function(R,N,m,i,q,g,X,f,K,P,O,p,o,s,j,B,z,l,h,F,d)j,z,K,O,d,s,f,p,o,P,l,F,h,B=-634435-(-634435),function(z,m,i,q)local jD={}local
